title: Assert should not be called on a tuple literal
description: Avoid using assert statements with tuple literals, as they can lead to fragile code.
message: Assert should not be called on a tuple literal
recommendation: Use a more appropriate testing method like unit tests

noncompliant.description: Assert called on a tuple literal

why_is_this_an_issue: Assert statements are for development and debugging purposes, and should not be used in production code. Using them with tuple literals can make the code less readable and more error-prone.
how_to_fix: Use a more appropriate testing method like unit tests
